title: Ocean Springs Fresh Market
content: The Ocean Springs Fresh Market is a Mississippi State certified, producer-only farmers market held every Saturday, rain or shine. Shop for organic produce, homemade baked goods, plants, herbs, and more from local farmers and vendors. A Gulf Coast tradition — bring the family, meet old friends, and make new ones.

title: Deana Carter Live at The Mary C.
content: Country music star Deana Carter performs live at The Mary C. O'Keefe Cultural Arts Center in Ocean Springs. Known for hits like "Strawberry Wine," this is a can't-miss evening of live music on the Gulf Coast.
venue: The Mary C. O'Keefe Cultural Arts Center

title: Feed the Need Music Festival & Fish Fry
content: The annual Feed the Need Music Festival and Fish Fry returns to Ocean Springs. Enjoy live music from local bands including Biloxi Bacon, Carey Hudson, The Kat Miller Band, and The Terrapins. All proceeds benefit Lord Is My Help, a community kitchen serving those in need across Jackson County. Great music, great food, great cause.
